path: PNGS/Aqa Muhammad ﷺ/Ali is first to enter paradise.jpeg
text: hakim:4662 - Abt Bakr b. Ishaq > Ubayd b. Hatim al- Hafiz > Muhammad b. Hatim al-Mu'addib > Sayf b. Muhammad > Sufyan al-Thawri > Salamah b. Kuhayl > Abti Sadiq > al-Aghar > Salman [Machine] The Messenger of Allah £ said: "The first among you to enter Paradise is the first among you who embraced Islam, Ali ibn Abi Talib." Adh-Dhahabi did not include this in his summarization. ® - Remains Silent (Dhahabi)
